# Claim Audit — sweep_summary.report.md

## P1 (decision-shaping, must address)

(none flagged)

## P2 (misleading framing)

| Quote | Why misleading | Correction or context |
|---|---|---|
| "Pass rate dropped from 60% to 50% — a 10% drop" | Conflates percentage points with percent | 10 pp absolute drop, 16.7% relative drop |
| "Top config X has 67.7% pass rate" | Selected from 504 configs — selection bias inflates point estimate | Out-of-sample expectation likely 5-15 pp lower |
